interaction.prompt: Zone entry. Both defenders are stacked at the blue line. Where's the right entry pass?

feedback.right: Strong-side wall to RW. Defenders cheated middle and weak-side; the strong wall is wide open for a clean entry.
feedback.wrong: The middle is clogged and weak-side is shadowed. Use the RW down the boards — that's the open lane.

tip: Stacked D at the blue line: pass DOWN the open side, don't carry through the middle.
why: Zone entries are about reading the gap. When defenders pinch the middle, the boards open up. Force them to defend the wider area.
